method.name: term
method.args: at least 3 characters, not just whitespace or common single characters

method.name: position
method.args: moved back by the length of removed comment markers

method.name: position
method.args: moved forward by the length of added comment markers

method.name: paintListBoxItem
method.args: number rowNumber, Graphics g, number width, number height, boolean rowIsSelected

method.name: setModulatorValue
method.args: number newValue, boolean vst, boolean midi, boolean ui

method.name: setProperty
method.args: Identifier name, variable newValue, boolean isUndoable

method.name: constructor
method.args: optional, can keep for backward compatibility

method.name: runtime
method.args: if you want Lua to control it

method.name: paintButton
method.args: Graphics g, boolean isMouseOverButton, boolean isButtonDown

method.name: get
method.args: class_id src, class_id target, class_id dynamic_id , number object_offset

method.name: put
method.args: class_id src, class_id target, class_id dynamic_id , number object_offset , number offset, number distance

method.name: cast
method.args: void p, class_id src, class_id target , class_id dynamic_id, void dynamic_ptr

method.name: insert
method.args: class_id src, class_id target, cast_function cast
